name: Manan Batra
summary:
Aspiring Data Engineer with hands-on experience in Apache Spark, PySpark, Databricks, and ETL pipeline develop-
ment.  Skilled in building scalable data processing workflows, implementing data warehousing concepts, and working
with modern data architectures such as Medallion Architecture and Delta Lake.  Proficient in cloud-based data plat-
forms and distributed data processing for large-scale datasets.  Additionally experienced in frontend development using
React.js, HTML5, CSS3, and Tailwind CSS to build responsive and user-friendly interfaces.

experience.title: Contract Consultant
highlights: Contributing to the SSAP (Sales Services Automation Platform) project, focusing on building and optimizing data pipelines to support large-scale analytics and reporting use cases.
Developed and optimized big data processing workflows using PySpark, Databricks, Python, and SQL to handle high-volume, distributed datasets efficiently.
Worked with cloud-based data architectures leveraging AWS and GCP, ensuring scalable, reliable, and performance-optimized data solutions.

experience.title: Trainee Software Engineer
highlights: Completed structured training in data engineering fundamentals, including Python, SQL, PySpark, Databricks, and distributed data processing concepts.
Built hands-on projects involving ETL pipelines, data transformation, and optimization on AWS and GCP cloud environments.
Applied software engineering best practices such as version control, modular design, and collaborative development in project-based learning.

experience.title: Subject Matter Expert
highlights: Delivered 200+ academic solutions across Computer Science subjects, improving student comprehension by 25%.
Created and reviewed 100+ structured study materials aligned with curriculum standards.
Increased course satisfaction ratings by 30% and supported higher completion rates through clear explanations.

projects.name: Healthcare Patient Analytics Pipeline
projects.description: End-to-end batch data pipeline processing healthcare patient records through Medallion Architecture (Bronze → Silver → Gold) using Databricks, PySpark, AWS S3, and Delta Lake. Delivers curated analytics tables powering BI dashboards for hospital performance, patient risk, and diagnosis trend analysis.
bullets: Engineered a scalable Medallion Architecture pipeline (Bronze → Silver → Gold) ingesting multi-CSV patient datasets via AWS Glue & S3
Built PySpark transformations for data cleaning, clinical range validation, deduplication via Spark MERGE, and schema evolution with Delta Lake
Orchestrated daily batch workflow at 2AM UTC using Databricks Workflows & Apache Airflow DAGs with email alerting on failures

projects.name: ViewTube ~ YouTube Clone
projects.description: Implemented real-time video streaming with API integration and optimized data fetching, resulting in 30% faster load times and improved user retention by 40%. Developed responsive UI with Tailwind CSS, ensuring accessibility compliance and increasing cross-device compatibility by 25%.
bullets: Built a YouTube clone with video streaming and API integration
Achieved 30% faster load times through optimized data fetching
Improved user retention by 40% with enhanced UX design
Developed responsive UI with Tailwind CSS for cross-device compatibility

projects.name: Movie Recommendation System
projects.description: Designed and deployed a high-performance movie recommendation API, cutting server response time by 50% through backend optimizations. Developed advanced predictive models that improved recommendation accuracy by 30%.
bullets: Built a high-performance movie recommendation system with advanced algorithms
Reduced server response time by 50% through backend optimizations
Improved recommendation accuracy by 30% using predictive models
Integrated RESTful APIs for seamless data exchange

projects.name: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A personal portfolio website designed to showcase skills, projects, and experience. Built with React and Tailwind CSS for a modern, responsive look.
bullets: Designed and developed a modern portfolio website to showcase projects and skills
Built with React and Tailwind CSS for responsive design
Integrated Framer Motion for smooth animations and transitions
